questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Join Execution Algorithms?
options: Inefficient scaling of Nested Loop Joins, Block Nested Loop, Index Nested Loop.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Nested Loop Joins, Block Nested Loop, Index Nested Loop.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Nested Loop Joins, Block Nested Loop, Index Nested Loop scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
